recent_announcements.summary: VEDANT FASHIONS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 25-Jul-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation
